message:
Add NASA FIRMS, OpenAQ, object detection, lighting analysis, fix ADR statuses

Extended sensor collectors:
- NASA FIRMS: near-real-time fire detection within 50km
- OpenAQ: air quality (PM2.5, NO2, O3) from nearest stations
- Object detection: luminance-region analysis (screens, colored objects)
- Lighting history: luminance + color temperature (warm/cool/neutral)
- collect_extended(): runs all collectors including new ones

ADR fixes: updated 7 stale statuses (Proposed→Accepted, Partially→Implemented).
RuView ADR-044 conflict resolved (provisioning tool → ADR-050).

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
